meaning: n.暴露,揭露,暴光,揭发,揭露,位向,方向,陈列
examples: Exposure to the sun ages the skin.
I used a long exposure for this one.
Exposure to the sun can accelerate the ageing process.
We can prevent violence by enhancing early brain development and reducing exposure to toxins.
The trouble for investors: Companies disclose very little if any information about their exposure to water-related risks.
